title: Validate Split() calls using an = sign to split on are doing what we hope
body:
As recently found in #7759, we had a problem where a `strings.Split(variable, "=")` was splitting into arrays larger than 2 members due to multiple equal signs in the variable and only the first one should have been split upon.  A grep search is listed below showing the instances in Podman.  Make sure that the variables don't have any equal signs within them that should not be split upon and adjust by changing the call to `strings.SplitN(variable, "=", 2) if pertinent.  Note, in some instances splitting multiple times on an equal sign might be a valid operation.

```
# cat !$
cat ~/podman_split.txt
./cmd/podman/common/volumes.go:		kv := strings.Split(s, "=")
./cmd/podman/common/volumes.go:		kv := strings.Split(val, "=")
./cmd/podman/common/volumes.go:		kv := strings.Split(val, "=")
./cmd/podman/common/volumes.go:		kv := strings.Split(val, "=")
./cmd/podman/common/volumes.go:		kv := strings.Split(val, "=")
./cmd/podman/networks/list.go:		tokens := strings.Split(networkListOptions.Filter, "=")
./cmd/podman/pods/ps.go:			split := strings.Split(f, "=")
./cmd/podman/volumes/list.go:		filterSplit := strings.Split(f, "=")
./hack/podman-registry-go/registry.go:		spl := strings.Split(s, "=")
./libpod/runtime_pod_infra_linux.go:				nameValSlice := strings.Split(nameValPair, "=")
./libpod/events/filters.go:	filterSplit := strings.Split(filter, "=")
./libpod/image/filters.go:		splitFilter := strings.Split(labelfilter, "=")
./libpod/image/filters.go:		splitFilter := strings.Split(filter, "=")
./libpod/image/search.go:		arr := strings.Split(f, "=")
./libpod/networking_linux.go:			parts := strings.Split(o, "=")
./pkg/spec/storage.go:		kv := strings.Split(arr[0], "=")
./pkg/spec/storage.go:		kv := strings.Split(val, "=")
./pkg/spec/storage.go:		kv := strings.Split(val, "=")
./pkg/spec/storage.go:		kv := strings.Split(val, "=")
./pkg/spec/security.go:		splitOpt := strings.Split(opt, "=")
./pkg/util/utils.go:		s := strings.Split(i, "=")
./pkg/util/utils.go:		arr := strings.Split(val, "=")
./pkg/varlinkapi/container.go:		split := strings.Split(i, "=")
./pkg/cgroups/blkio.go:				d := strings.Split(item, "=")
./pkg/api/handlers/compat/containers_create.go:		splitEnv := strings.Split(e, "=")
./pkg/domain/infra/abi/network.go:		tokens = strings.Split(options.Filter, "=")
./pkg/domain/infra/tunnel/events.go:			split := strings.Split(filter, "=")
./pkg/domain/infra/tunnel/images.go:		f := strings.Split(filter, "=")
./pkg/domain/infra/tunnel/images.go:		f := strings.Split(filter, "=")
```

comments.body: Dang it, the PR did have green test buttons I swear.  Will go look.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I believe this was fixed a while ago, closing.
@rhatdan thanks for closing.  The PR was indeed closed recently to address this, I must not have tagged this issue correctly in the PR.
